chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 658 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.3531/2025 2. For hearing of main case 28.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Saad Shafiq Siddiqui, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent, which is taken on record. Statement has been filed on behalf of respondent No.2 which is taken on record. Admittedly the assessment is in respect of valuation, therefore, no case of provisional release is made out. Petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
